title: Shells Town Under Morgan’s Fear
description: On pages 0–2, this part turns Zoro’s imprisonment into open action as Luffy forces the fight against Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't have much choice! Now, until me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's eaten one of the devil fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NO WAY! SO THAT'S HIS POWER...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If bullets can't hurt him, then use your swords!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UNH! These knots are too tight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THERE! I untied one of your arms!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those who defy me must die!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
